name: SeeMe
description:
Stay close, no matter the distance.
SeeMe lets you and your partner share real-time phone activity — so you always feel connected. See what they're up to, know when they're online, and share notifications instantly.
Features:
• Real-time live activity — shows the actual app, not just the home screen
• Near-instant online & offline status
• Shared notifications with your partner
• Stays active even on battery-optimized phones
• One universal build for all Android devices
Simple. Private. Always in sync.

reviews.comment: Incredible speed and clean interface. Love using it every day!
Great app overall. Looking forward to notification share updates.

name: Smizofy TV
description: Secure your private photos, videos, and documents behind encrypted security layers. Protect your personal files easily.

reviews.comment: Works everything cool and all channels perfect.
